_comment: Project-scoped MCP servers for Hawthorne Racing. Claude Code auto-loads any server defined under "mcpServers" and prompts you to approve project MCP servers the first time the repo is opened. The "_examples" block is NOT read by Claude Code (only "mcpServers" is) — to enable a server, copy an entry from "_examples" into "mcpServers" and edit it. Prefer ${ENV_VAR} placeholders over hard-coded secrets; never commit tokens.
